raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir winna pirmas un peh-
jas Leetas/ redsi/ tahs irr to
fraeta unn Juhda Kehninnu
rahmatā rakstitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXXVI. Nodalla.
Joakas: 1. Jojakims: 5. Jojakins: 9. Zibe,
kijus:11. Tohy tapehs/ ka tee nelabbi walda
wiși Zeetuma aiswesti : 4/ 6/ 10/17/ 18.
Un paleek Zeetuma septindeſmits Gaddus:
11. Lihds tam pirman Gaddam tahs Wal-
dischanas Korefa/ ta Kehnina eekſch Per,
sias: 22.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nehme tee Laudis
tahs Semmes Joakasu
Josjus Dehtu/un darri-
to par Kehninnu fawa Tehwa
Beetā Jerusalemiê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Dividesmits un trihs Gad-
us bija Joakas wezz / kad tas
ar Kehninnu tappe / un waldiia
ihs Mehneschus Jerusalemiê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Io tas Egiptes Kehninsch
ozehle to Jerusalemiê / un uslik-
tai Semmei par Mefleem fiunts
alentus Sudraba / un weenu
alentu Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Egiptes Kehninsch
arrija Elijakimu winna Brah-
par Kehninnu pahr Juhdu un
erusalemē / un dewe winnam
ttu Wahrdu Jojakim/ bet Jo-
afu winna Brahli/ nehme Ne-
is/ un wedde to us Egiptes-
emint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Diwidesmits un peezung
addus wezz bija Jojakims/ kad
is par Kehninnu tappe/ un wal-
ja weenpadeſnits Gaddus Je-
salemē / un darrija / kas tam
UNGAM fatwam Deewam
e patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pretti to zehlahs Nebu-
kadnezars tas Babeles Keh-
ninsch/ un fehje to ar diwi War-
ra Schkehdehm/ ka tas to us Ba-
beli westu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Nebukadnezars ais,
wedde arridsan zittus no ta
KUNGA Namina Rihkeimuhs
Babeli/ un likke to Babelē fawa
Deewa Namina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Jojakima
Leetahmatleek/un winna Negantibas/ ko winſch irr darrijs / un
kas pee ta irr atrastas / raugi /
tas wiſs irr to Israēta un Juha
Da Kehninnu Grahmata rakstihts/
un winna Dehis Jojakinstappe
par Kehninnu winna Weetā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Astonus Gaddus wezz bi-
ja Jojakins/ kad tas par Kehni-
nu tappe/ un waldiia trihs Meh-
neſchus un deſnits Deenas Je-
rusalemē / un darrija / kas tam
KURGAM ne patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad jauns Gads at-
gabje/ fuhtiia tas Kehninsch Ne-
bukadnezars/ un likke to ar teem
dahrgakeem Rihkeim ta KUNG-
GA Namina us Babeli west/
un darrija Zedeſijn winna Brah-
li par Kehninnu pahr Juhdu un
Jerusalemē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Diwidesmits un weenu
Gaddu bija Zedeſtius wezz / kad
tas par Kehninnu tappe/ un wal-
dija weenpadeſnits Gaddus Je-
rusalemē-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un darrija/ kas tam KUNG-
GAM fawam Deewain ne pa-
tikke / wiſch ne pasennmojahē
preekſch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
